item.title: Sudah nonton MV Kusuka Hari Minggu? Kalau sudah, bagian favorit kalian yang mana? Terima kasih untuk dukungan dan positif feedback dari kalian semua🥹 Semoga lagu ini menjadi lagu yang bisa membuat hari-hari kalian menyenangkan! Terima kasih kepada orang-o

item.title: What do you think about our "that won't save us"? I always thought her voice holds so much power, I really want to hear her singing this kind of songs with me and she delivered!👏 Thank you, Kak @Greesella Adhalia or collaborating with me! Let's do more
item.description: What do you think about our "that won't save us"? I always thought her voice holds so much power, I really want to hear her singing this kind of songs with me and she delivered!👏 Thank you, Kak @Greesella Adhalia or collaborating with me! Let's do more

item.title: 📢 Kizaru x JKT48 Virtual Hai semuanya, aku ada pengumuman! Aku ikut menjadi bagian dari kolaborasi resmi JKT48 Virtual dan Kizaru loh! Aku akan hadir dalam apparel trendy & chic, serta produk merchandise eksklusif lainnya. Ayo bawa pulang merch aku sekara
